hallucination.rationale: The generated note is entirely a thinking/reasoning process and does not contain an actual clinical note. There is no clinical content to evaluate for hallucination, but the output fundamentally fails to produce a note.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking process with no actual clinical note generated. It completely fails to follow the instruction to produce a structured clinical note.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was produced, so no transcript content was captured in a note format.

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was output; the entire output is an internal reasoning/thinking process that loops endlessly.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted as no clinical note was produced.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive repetitive/looping content where the same reasoning about the ROS section is repeated hundreds of times.
